sqlMap.select: select id from bul_type where type_name = #name# and accountid = #accountId#
sqlMap.update: update bul_data set create_date = #createDate#, update_date = #updateDate#, publish_date = #publishDate# where id = #id#
sqlMap.select: select id from ( select * from BBS_ARTICLE ORDER BY ISSUE_TIME desc) where ROWNUM=1 and article_name=#articleName#

select id,body_type fileType,to_char(content) fileId from BUL_BODY c where c.body_type != 'HTML' and id = #id# union all select id,body_type fileType,to_char(content) fileId from news_body c where c.body_type != 'HTML' and id = #id#
